findings.description: The knowledge file adds a '型' (type) column to the property tables with values 'String' (for messageId in s2/s3) and 'int' (for length in s4). These type values do not appear anywhere in the source document. The source tables have only two columns: 'property名' and '設定内容'. The 'デフォルト値' column is also added but left empty, and 'String'/'int' type annotations are purely invented.
findings.source_evidence: Source table structure (all sections): columns are 'property名' and '設定内容' only. No type information is provided for any property in the source.

findings.location: s3 — 日本電話番号バリデーション
findings.description: Section s3 is very long (well over 2000 characters) and collapses three h3-level subsections from the source ('単項目の電話番号に対する精査', '複数項目で表される電話番号に対する精査', and their respective '精査仕様'/'実装例' subsections) into a single knowledge section. Per the V3 rule, an RST h2 section with >= 2000 chars and existing h3 subsections should be split.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains h3 headings: '単項目の電話番号に対する精査' (with '精査仕様' h4), '複数項目で表される電話番号に対する精査' (with '精査仕様' and '実装例' h4s) all under the h2 '日本電話番号バリデーション'.

findings.description: The hints array for s3 is missing PascalCase class names and annotation names that appear in the code example within the section: '@ValidateFor', 'ValidationContext', 'ValidationUtil', 'StringUtil'. These are referenced in the implementation example and are searchable identifiers users might query.
